scope: Implement a deterministic source policy coherence evaluator and regression set.
controls_implemented: Deterministic ALLOW, REVIEW, and HALT outcomes

checks.name: current-authoritative-final-policy
checks.evidence: schema valid, policy PASS, gate ALLOW

checks.name: expired-source-policy-blocked
checks.evidence: schema valid, policy PASS, gate HALT

checks.name: incoherent-final-source-policy
checks.evidence: schema valid, policy FAIL, gate HALT as expected

checks.name: current-corroboration-review
checks.evidence: schema valid, policy PASS, gate REVIEW

checks.name: remote-artifact-match
checks.evidence: 2 of 2 remote branch artifacts matched tested local content

failures.summary: The temporary Ajv verifier was unavailable when validation began.
failures.next_action: Restore isolated Ajv before running strict schema checks.

result.rationale: The implementation and fixtures passed, while executable policy remains pending human review.

unresolved_risks.next_action: Review policy semantics and approve, revise, or reject PR #6.

unresolved_risks.summary: Source identity and ownership remain externally asserted.
unresolved_risks.next_action: Add authenticated registry resolution in a later integration increment.

next_queued_item.summary: Define a durable machine-checkable build-run record.
